title: Attaching or Syncing Files to Board as a Whole (not just every item)
excerpt: What’s needed:  Attaching or Syncing Files to Board as a Whole instead of having to add them to every item.  Please add this as a feature with API support too so it can be automated.

posts.author: Huey (Elijah)
posts.cookedHtml: What’s needed: Attaching or Syncing Files to Board as a Whole instead of having to add them to every item. Please add this as a feature with API support too so it can be automated.
